name: Browser Credential Files Accessed
description: Detects processes accessing sensitive browser credential and data files, which could indicate an attempt to steal login information or other valuable data. This rule covers Chrome, Edge, and Firefox.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file access event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for file access (e.g., 8 for FileCreate, FileCreateStreamHash, FileRead).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process attempting to access the browser files.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process attempting to access the browser files.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that spawned the accessing process.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that spawned the accessing process.

parameters.name: target_filename
parameters.description: The name of the browser credential or data file that was accessed.

parameters.name: access_type
parameters.description: The type of file access detected (e.g., 'Read').
